query: UPDATE export_logs el JOIN ml_listings ml ON el.productId = ml.productId AND ml.mlItemId IS NOT NULL AND ml.mlItemId != '' SET el.mlItemId = ml.mlItemId WHERE el.status = 'success' AND el.mlItemId IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Zv4Qvr7xnDv85L.fd0c5f77ba12 --database nQNUJejXd53raznAt7q8o4 --execute UPDATE export_logs el JOIN ml_listings ml ON el.productId = ml.productId AND ml.mlItemId IS NOT NULL AND ml.mlItemId != '' SET el.mlItemId = ml.mlItemId WHERE el.status = 'success' AND el.mlItemId IS NULL;
